Full Screen v0.1.3 hardens the in-app release updater and its local cache.

- Verifies downloaded release scripts against the SHA-256 checksum published with each GitHub Release.
- Rejects mismatched runtime versions and automatically discards corrupt or obsolete cached scripts.
- Falls back to verified network loading when IndexedDB is unavailable.
- Adds request and database timeouts, stale-cache warnings, and safe local-storage error handling.
- Changes “Later” update prompts to a 24-hour snooze and retries prompts when another modal is open.
- Adds automated coverage for version comparison, checksum validation, storage fallbacks, stale metadata, and runtime handshakes.
